title: You are seeing dungeons (YASD)
description: Introduces into the game a multitude of new dungeons in order for players to explore and discover
body:
рџ’ЂDISCOVER NEW GROUPS OF ENEMIES, EACH ONE WITH A NEW COMBAT STYLEрџ’Ђ
There're 4 types of new mob groups: Desert Pillagers, Mucus Creatures, Gloomy Skeletons and Light Creatures. Each group has its own special thing. For example all the mucus creatures cannot spawn naturally until you activate the Despair Cluster block with the Reality Modifier 
  

 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

вљ”пёЏрџђ‰SOME GROUPS HAVE IT'S OWN LEADER, A LEADER THAT REACHS THE DIVINE POWERвљ”пёЏрџђ‰
Light Creatures, gloomy skeletons (and the mucus creatures) have its own leader that reaches the divinity!}

  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

рџ§±DISCOVER NEW ITEMS THAT MAKES THE ADVENTURE BETTER AND THE COMBATES MORER BALANCEDрџ§±
The mobs in this mod aren't easy to defeat, so you have to use the modded items to kill them easier!

 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
рџ—ЎпёЏUPGRADE WEAPONS USING PURE ELEMENTSрџ—ЎпёЏ
You can upgrade some weapons with pure elements in order to get a stronger and more useful weapon!

  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
рџЊЂBREAK THE DIMENSIONAL MARBLEрџЊЂ
Be careful, when a spell fails the reality marble will be damaged and the mucus creatures will appear from a dimensional rift, defeat it in order to close it!

  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

рџ’°TRADE WITH VILLAGERSрџ’°
You can get some items by trading with the villagers!

 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
рџ§їUNIFY THE REALITYрџ§ї
Find the altar and put the Reality Modifier in it, the reality will be unified again and the mucus creatures will spawn naturally

 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
вљњпёЏBUILD THE STRONGEST TURRET AGAINST DARK CREATURES, THE DIVINA GUARDIANвљњпёЏ
 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SUGGESTIONS

вћ°I RECOMMEND TO USE THE SETTING ''ENTITY DISTANCE'' ON +350%
 

вћ°USE JEI IN ORDER TO SEE RECIPES
  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

вљ пёЏTHIS MOD IS IN BETA AND HIATUS вљ пёЏ
 
 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
вљ пёЏKNOWN BUGS/PROBLEMSвљ пёЏ

THIS WILL BE FIXED IN NEXT UPDATES

в›”THE SUMMONER-TYPE ENTITIES CAN SUMMON INDEFINITELY AND IT CAN CAUSE CRASHES

в›”A LOT OF LAG IN SOME FIGHTS

в›”HEART TOKEN'S BOOST STACKS TO ALL PLAYERS IN ONLINE SERVERS (ALMOST FIXED)

в›”LACK OF WIKI (WIP DISCORD)

в›”FORGOTTEN ITEM FAMILIES (AMULETS)

 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

рџ“№VIDEOSрџ“№
If you upload a video of my mod leave it in the comments to watch it. Also with this videos I can improve the mod's quality ^^
